---
title: "basic_stat_comparison"
author: "subhash"
date: "2024-03-19"
output: NULL
DATA : "sorghum_SAP_genotype data- subsetted"
---

```{r setup}
knitr::opts_chunk$set(echo = TRUE) 
knitr::opts_knit$set(root.dir=normalizePath('..//')) 
```


```{r}
#install.packages("tidyverse")
#install.packages("ggplot2")
#install.packages("vcfR")
#install.packages("ggplot2")
library(tidyverse)
library(ggplot2)
library(vcfR)
library(ggplot2)
```

```{r}

#all the output files are otained from plink2.0    allele frequency = --freq , missing rate = --misssing  
#from PLINK2.0

var_freq <- read_delim("./basic_stat/ID.afreq", delim = "\t") #reading the data frame
var_freq$REF_FREQS <- 1 - var_freq$ALT_FREQS#calculating refrence allele frreequency since plink2.0 has calcuated only alternative allele
var_freq$maf <- pmin(var_freq$ALT_FREQS, var_freq$REF_FREQS)#minimum freequency of alt or ref
#hist(var_freq$maf,breaks = 50)#normal R histogram
#using ggplot to create a histogram
ggplot(var_freq, aes(x = maf)) + 
  geom_histogram(fill = "blue", color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Histogram of Minor Allele Frequency", x = "MAF", y = "Count") + 
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold")) +
  theme(axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"))

var_miss <- read_delim("./basic_stat/ID.vmiss", delim = "\t")
#hist(var_miss$F_MISS,breaks = 50)
ggplot(var_miss, aes(x = F_MISS)) + 
  geom_histogram(fill = "blue", color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Histogram of variant missing rate from PLINK2.0", x = "missing rate", y = "Count (Variants)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))

```





```{r}

vcf <- read.vcfR("./basic_stat/SAP_subset.vcf")
geno_matrix <- extract.gt(vcf)
geno_df <- as.data.frame(geno_matrix)
g_df <- as.data.frame(geno_matrix)
g_df$ID <- rownames(g_df)
g_df <- g_df[, c("ID", names(g_df)[1:ncol(g_df)-1])]
IDs <- g_df[, 1]

calculate_allele_frequencies <- function(geno_df) {
  # Flatten the geno_row into a single vector and exclude NAs
  genotypes <- unlist(geno_df)
  genotypes <- genotypes[!is.na(genotypes)]
  
  # Initialize counters for alleles
  total_alleles <- 0
  allele_0_count <- 0
  allele_1_count <- 0
  
  # Loop through all genotypes to count alleles
  for (genotype in genotypes) {
    alleles <- strsplit(genotype, "")[[1]]  # Split genotype into individual alleles
    alleles <- as.numeric(alleles)  # Convert characters to numeric
    
    # Count alleles
    allele_0_count <- allele_0_count + sum(alleles == 0, na.rm = TRUE)
    allele_1_count <- allele_1_count + sum(alleles == 1, na.rm = TRUE)
    total_alleles <- total_alleles + 2  # Each genotype contributes 2 alleles
  }
  
  # Calculate allele frequencies
  freq_0 <- round(allele_0_count / total_alleles , 8)
  freq_1 <- round(allele_1_count / total_alleles , 8)
  
  return(c(ref = freq_0, alt = freq_1))
}

# Apply the function to each row of the dataframe
allele_freqs <- t(apply(geno_df, 1, calculate_allele_frequencies))

# Convert to a dataframe for easier viewing/manipulation
allele_freqs_df <- as.data.frame(allele_freqs)
manual_allele_freq <- data.frame(ID = IDs, allele_freqs_df)
manual_allele_freq$maf <- pmin(manual_allele_freq$ref, manual_allele_freq$alt)
#hist(geno_df$maf,breaks = 50)
ggplot(manual_allele_freq, aes(x = maf)) + 
  geom_histogram(fill = "green", color = "black") +
  labs(title = "MAF_manual", x = "MAF", y = "Count") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))


missing_rate_variant <- apply(geno_df, 1, function(x) mean(is.na(x)))
var_miss_manual <- data.frame(ID = IDs, missing_rate_variant = missing_rate_variant)
ggplot(var_miss_manual, aes(x = missing_rate_variant)) + 
  geom_histogram(fill = "green", color = "black") +
  labs(title = "Histogram of variant missing rate manual", x = "missing rate", y = "Count (Variants)") +
  theme(axis.text.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.text.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.x = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        axis.title.y = element_text(size = 14, face = "bold"),
        plot.title = element_text(size = 16, face = "bold", hjust = 0.5))
```



```{r}

#comparing allele frequency from manual calculation to Plink2.0
af_df <- merge(manual_allele_freq, var_freq, by = "ID")
af_df <- af_df[, c("ID", "maf.x", "maf.y")]
#scatter plot for allele freequency comparision
ggplot(af_df, aes(x = maf.x, y = maf.y)) +
  geom_point() +
  labs(title = "minor allele freequency",
       x = "Manual Calculation", y = "Plink2.0") +
  theme_minimal()


#comparing manually calculated and Plink2.0 calculated variant missing rate with scatter plot
comp_var_miss <- merge(var_miss_manual, var_miss, by = "ID")
comp_var_miss <- comp_var_miss[, c("ID", "missing_rate_variant", "F_MISS")]
#scatterplot for variant missingrate
ggplot(comp_var_miss, aes(x = missing_rate_variant, y = F_MISS)) +
  geom_point() +  # This adds the scatter plot points
  labs(title = "Scatter Plot of variant missing rate comparision",
       x = "Manual_calculation", y = "Plink2.0") +
  theme_minimal()  


```
